description: Combined total AUM invested in the three share classes of the Vanguard FTSE Social Index Fund in Millions of dollars.

Effect on the cost of capital of introducing ESG investors into the economy:The curves plot the change in the cost of capital, ΔR̄−ΔR̄∗, as a function of the fraction of wealth ESG investors comprise. The red curve is the exact effect on the cost of capital, that is, (C.1). The dashed black curve is the approximation, that is, (10).
S&P500 index inclusion effect: The curve plots the change in the expected return, ΔR̄−ΔR̄∗, as a function of γ the fraction of wealth S&P 500 investors comprise, that is, (11).
FTSE index constituents: Number of constituents of the FTSE USA, the FTSE USA 4 Good and the FTSE USA 4 Good Select Indices.
FTSE index market capitalization: Total market capitalization of the FTSE USA, the FTSE USA 4 Good and the FTSE USA 4 Good Select Indices in $ Trillions.
Inclusion months: Number of total months included in the FTSE USA and the FTSE USA 4 Good Indices.
Inclusion months: Number of total months included in the FTSE USA and the FTSE USA 4 Good Select Indices.
